title: Dalek Mod: All Dimensions
description: Dalek Mod addon that adds in all dimensions to the dimensional selector.
body:
# DM: All Dimensions Addon
[Dalek Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dalek-mod) addon that adds in all dimensions to the dimensional selector via code.

Notice this is a server-side mod and must be installed on the server or you are in single-player. This will not allow you to bypass server restrictions.
